FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyIntr.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyIntr.raw_text: 用这双手，\n我要创造我的胜利！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyIntr.display_text:
用这双手，
我要创造我的胜利！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyDefe.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyDefeat
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyDefe.raw_text: 真是羞愧死了……\n我脸红了……$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyDefe.display_text:
真是羞愧死了……
我脸红了……

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyPost.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyPost.raw_text: 噢，我的涂料管\n散乱得到处都是！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DaisyPost.display_text:
噢，我的涂料管
散乱得到处都是！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaInt.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaInt.raw_text: 不好意思！\n我正忙着画画。\l请你别挡我的视线！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaInt.display_text:
不好意思！
我正忙着画画。
请你别挡我的视线！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaDef.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaDefeat
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaDef.display_text:
输了……
我觉得我出局了……

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaPos.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaPos.raw_text: 雪野？\n请稍微倾斜一下你的头部……\l好了！这就是我想要的姿势！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_CelinaPos.display_text:
雪野？
请稍微倾斜一下你的头部……
好了！这就是我想要的姿势！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaIntr.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaIntr.raw_text: 唔……\n这鱼钓的，这儿真不安静……$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaIntr.display_text:
唔……
这鱼钓的，这儿真不安静……

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaDefe.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaDefeat
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaDefe.display_text:
呃……
我的感觉，太烦闷了……

encoding.hex: 13 F5 B0 B0 FE 0D 98 03 0B 04 3A 07 A5 3B 0C AC 03 B6 09 5E 08 9E B0 B0 FF

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaPost.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaPost.raw_text: 天空和海洋……\n它们都是变幻无常的。\p它们的这种特性\n使得人们很难征服它们。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_RaynaPost.display_text:
天空和海洋……
它们都是变幻无常的。

它们的这种特性
使得人们很难征服它们。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiIntr.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiIntr.raw_text: 如果你一定要知道，\n我正打算拜访我朋友隐居的地方。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiIntr.display_text:
如果你一定要知道，
我正打算拜访我朋友隐居的地方。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiPost.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiPost.raw_text: 在海边和煦的微风之中，\n来一场从容的战斗真是令人惬意。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_JackiPost.display_text:
在海边和煦的微风之中，
来一场从容的战斗真是令人惬意。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianIn.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianIn.raw_text: 我正在想着\n专门为宝可梦建一个游泳池。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianIn.display_text:
我正在想着
专门为宝可梦建一个游泳池。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianPo.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianPo.raw_text: 一个游泳池是很好，但是我要说，\n一个日光浴室也许更令人赞叹。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_GillianPo.display_text:
一个游泳池是很好，但是我要说，
一个日光浴室也许更令人赞叹。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinInt.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinInt.raw_text: 我很擅长跑步。\n我速度可是很快的！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinInt.display_text:
我很擅长跑步。
我速度可是很快的！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinDef.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinDefeat
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinDef.display_text:
哎哟！
我撞到东西了！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinPos.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinPos.raw_text: 当我迎着风奔跑时，\n我感觉我能飞起来！$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_DestinPos.display_text:
当我迎着风奔跑时，
我感觉我能飞起来！

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyIntro.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyIntro
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyIntro.raw_text: 我发现这个度假胜地之中\n这些海上生物跟我很合拍。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyIntro.display_text:
我发现这个度假胜地之中
这些海上生物跟我很合拍。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyDefea.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyDefeat
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyDefea.raw_text: 这太震惊了！\n你一定在开玩笑。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyDefea.display_text:
这太震惊了！
你一定在开玩笑。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyPostB.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyPostBattle
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyPostB.raw_text: 变得这么严重……\n多么荒谬啊。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_TobyPostB.display_text:
变得这么严重……
多么荒谬啊。

FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_SelphyTha.label: FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_SelphyThanksYouMayGoNow
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_SelphyTha.raw_text: 秋穗：谢谢你。\p你可以走了。$
FiveIsland_ResortGorgeous_Text_SelphyTha.display_text:
秋穗：谢谢你。

你可以走了。
